wiki_catalogs.name: Project Overview
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive content for the Royal POS Modern project overview section. Explain the system's purpose as a comprehensive Point of Sale solution for Tanzanian retail businesses, its core value proposition, and target audience. Document the complete feature set including sales management, inventory control, customer relationship management, supplier coordination, and financial reporting. Describe the multi-location architecture and real-time capabilities. Include the technology stack overview covering React 18, TypeScript, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, and ShadCN UI. Provide system architecture insights showing how frontend, backend, and database components work together. Address the mobile-first design approach and cloud-native deployment strategy. Use terminology consistent with the codebase and include practical examples of typical business scenarios.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication Mechanisms
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for authentication mechanisms in Royal POS Modern. Explain the Supabase authentication integration including user registration, login/logout processes, and session management. Document the AuthContext provider pattern and how it manages authentication state throughout the application. Cover the login form implementation, sign-up process, and password reset functionality. Explain the authentication state change listener that monitors user sessions and handles automatic logout scenarios. Document error handling for authentication failures, including email confirmation requirements and refresh token validation. Include practical examples of implementing authentication guards, protected routes, and session persistence. Address common authentication issues like expired sessions, network errors, and multi-device conflicts.

wiki_catalogs.name: Product Catalog Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the product catalog management system. Explain the complete product CRUD operations including creation, updates, deletion, and activation/deactivation of products. Document the multi-tab form interface covering basic information (name, category, barcode, SKU), pricing details (cost price, selling price, wholesale price), and inventory settings. Cover the advanced filtering and sorting capabilities including search by name, category, barcode, SKU, and status filtering. Explain the bulk product import functionality and how it handles existing product updates versus new product creation. Document the unit of measure system with all supported measurement units. Include practical examples of product creation workflows, barcode scanning integration, and category management. Address product validation rules, error handling, and user feedback mechanisms. Provide troubleshooting guidance for common product management issues and performance optimization tips for large product catalogs.

wiki_catalogs.name: Sales Terminal
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive sales terminal documentation for Royal POS Modern's real-time point of sale interface. Explain the sales cart functionality including product scanning via barcode, manual product selection, quantity adjustment, and price modification. Document the payment processing system supporting cash, card, and mobile money transactions with tax calculations and discount applications. Cover the receipt generation process with QR code integration and print functionality. Detail the customer association features allowing walk-in customers and registered customer transactions. Include step-by-step workflows for common sales scenarios, error handling for out-of-stock items and payment failures, and integration with inventory systems for real-time stock updates. Provide troubleshooting guidance for barcode scanner issues, payment gateway problems, and receipt printing failures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Supplier Profiles and Registration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for supplier profile management in Royal POS Modern. Explain the complete supplier registration workflow including company information capture, contact details management, and supplier categorization. Document the supplier CRUD operations with detailed field descriptions for name, contact person, email, phone, address, tax ID (TIN), and product categories supplied. Cover supplier status management (active/inactive) and supplier performance tracking integration. Explain the supplier search functionality and filtering capabilities. Document the import/export features for bulk supplier management operations. Include practical examples of supplier registration scenarios, common data validation rules, and troubleshooting guidance for supplier-related issues. Address supplier data integrity and consistency requirements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Customer Profiles and Registration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for customer profile management in Royal POS Modern. Explain the complete customer registration workflow including customer creation, editing, and deletion operations. Document the customer data model with fields for personal information (first_name, last_name, email, phone, address, tax_id) and loyalty points system. Cover the customer search functionality with filtering by name, email, and phone number. Explain the import/export capabilities for bulk customer management operations. Detail the customer segmentation system powered by AutomationService for VIP customer identification. Include practical examples of customer CRUD operations, form validation rules, and error handling. Address customer data integrity, duplicate detection during imports, and the relationship between general customers and outlet-specific customer records. Provide troubleshooting guidance for common customer management issues and best practices for customer data maintenance.

wiki_catalogs.name: QR Code System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive QR code system documentation for Royal POS Modern. Explain the complete QR code implementation including receipt generation, QR code creation using qrcode library, and display functionality. Document the receipt printing system with customizable templates, print formatting, and mobile device optimization. Cover the QR code verification system for receipt authenticity and transaction validation. Explain the direct QR code generation process, data encoding strategies, and error correction levels. Include detailed explanations of receipt data structures, QR code data URLs, and print quality optimization. Address mobile-optimized receipt viewing, cross-platform compatibility, and troubleshooting guidance for QR code generation and printing issues. Provide practical examples of QR code usage scenarios and debugging techniques.

wiki_catalogs.name: Income Tracking and Revenue Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the income tracking and revenue management system in Royal POS Modern. Explain the complete revenue tracking workflow from sales data capture through income statement generation. Document the income statement functionality including revenue calculation, VAT handling, and profit margin analysis. Cover the sales data aggregation process, return handling, and revenue reconciliation. Detail the financial reporting features including print functionality, PDF export, and data visualization. Include practical examples of revenue tracking scenarios, tax calculation methodologies, and financial analysis workflows. Address revenue recognition principles, sales categorization, and performance metrics calculation. Provide troubleshooting guidance for revenue data discrepancies and integration with external accounting systems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Settings Configuration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive settings configuration documentation for Royal POS Modern system settings. Document the global settings system including business configuration (name, address, phone, currency, timezone), receipt settings (printing preferences, headers, logo display), custom receipt templates with detailed configuration options, notification settings (email notifications, low stock alerts, daily reports), security settings (password requirements, session timeout, two-factor authentication), and display settings (dark mode, language, font size). Explain the outlet-specific settings for location-based configuration and access control. Include practical examples of configuring each setting category, template customization workflows, and best practices for system administration. Document the settings persistence mechanism using localStorage and provide troubleshooting guidance for common configuration issues.

wiki_catalogs.name: Database Service API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for the Database Service. Document all CRUD operations including getUsers, getUserById, createUser, updateUser, deleteUser for user management. Detail product operations including getProducts, getProductById, getProductByBarcode, getProductBySKU, createProduct, updateProduct, deleteProduct with validation rules. Cover inventory operations like incrementProductStock and decrementProductStock. Document outlet management APIs, sales operations, purchase orders, expenses, debts, discounts, returns, inventory audits, access logs, tax records, damaged products, and report generation. Include detailed parameter schemas, return value formats, error handling patterns, and Supabase integration specifics. Provide practical examples of API usage, common query patterns, and performance optimization techniques for database operations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Custom Report Generation
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the custom report generation system in Royal POS Modern. Explain the report builder interface, date range filtering capabilities, and report type selection. Document the implementation of different report categories including sales, inventory, customers, suppliers, expenses, and saved records. Cover the report preview functionality, data filtering mechanisms, and real-time report updates. Include practical examples of generating custom reports with specific date ranges, filtering criteria, and report layouts. Explain the report data transformation process, currency formatting, and statistical calculations. Address report scheduling, automated report generation workflows, and integration with external business intelligence tools.

wiki_catalogs.name: General Settings
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the General Settings section of Royal POS Modern. Document the business configuration settings including business name, address, phone number, currency selection, and timezone configuration. Explain how these settings affect system-wide operations and display formatting. Include practical examples of configuring each field, supported currency codes (TZS, USD, EUR, GBP), timezone options (Africa/Dar_es_Salaam, America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo), and validation rules. Document the relationship between currency settings and price formatting, timezone impact on date/time displays, and how business information appears across the system. Provide troubleshooting guidance for common configuration issues and best practices for maintaining accurate business information.

wiki_catalogs.name: User Management API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for User Management operations. Document all user CRUD operations including getUsers for retrieving all users with sorting by username, getUserById for single user retrieval with proper error handling, createUser for user registration with validation for required fields (username, first_name, last_name), updateUser for partial updates with timestamp management, and deleteUser for user removal. Include detailed parameter schemas showing User interface properties, return value formats with proper TypeScript typing, error handling patterns for database constraints and validation errors. Provide practical examples of API usage including authentication workflows, user profile management, and role-based access control scenarios. Document Supabase integration specifics including RLS policies, session management, and security considerations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Getting Started
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive getting started documentation for Royal POS Modern. Include detailed prerequisites covering Node.js installation, npm setup, and development environment requirements. Provide step-by-step installation instructions starting from repository cloning through dependency installation to local development server startup. Document the Supabase setup process including account creation, project configuration, database initialization, and environment variable configuration. Explain the role of .env files and how to properly configure VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. Include initial user registration, login process, and first-time system configuration. Address common setup issues and provide troubleshooting guidance. Include verification steps to ensure proper installation and demonstrate basic system functionality with screenshots or code examples.

wiki_catalogs.name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system in Royal POS Modern. Explain the hierarchical role structure including Admin, Manager, Salesman, and Staff roles with their specific permissions and limitations. Document the sales permission utilities that enforce access restrictions for different user roles. Cover the protected route implementation that checks user roles before granting access to sensitive areas like sales management, financial reports, and system settings. Explain how roles are assigned during user registration and updated through the admin interface. Document the sales restriction policies that prevent unauthorized users from accessing certain sales functionalities. Include practical examples of implementing role-based UI components, conditional rendering based on user permissions, and dynamic menu generation. Address role inheritance patterns, permission escalation, and audit trail for role changes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Stock Control System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the stock control system covering real-time inventory tracking, stock level management, and automated stock synchronization. Explain the stock monitoring interface showing current quantities, minimum stock levels, and stock status indicators (in stock, low stock, out of stock). Document the automatic stock quantity updates during sales transactions and how the system maintains inventory accuracy. Cover the stock synchronization mechanisms between sales and inventory systems, including sold quantity tracking and price synchronization. Explain the low stock alert system with configurable thresholds and notification mechanisms. Document manual stock adjustment capabilities and the audit trail for stock changes. Include practical examples of stock receiving workflows, transfer operations, and inventory adjustments. Address stock discrepancy resolution, batch management, and expiry date tracking where applicable. Provide guidance on setting up optimal stock levels, handling stockouts, and maintaining inventory accuracy across multiple outlets.

wiki_catalogs.name: Sales Orders Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed sales orders management documentation covering the complete order lifecycle from creation to fulfillment. Explain order creation with product selection, quantity specification, and customer association. Document order modification capabilities including quantity adjustments, product removal, and status changes. Cover order cancellation procedures and refund processing. Detail the order tracking system showing real-time status updates from pending to completed. Explain the order search and filtering functionality with date ranges, customer names, and order numbers. Include the order details view with itemized breakdowns, pricing calculations, and payment information. Document the integration with inventory systems for stock reservation and automatic stock updates upon order completion. Address order archiving, historical tracking, and reporting capabilities. Provide guidance on bulk order operations and template-based order creation.

wiki_catalogs.name: Purchase Orders Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the purchase orders management system in Royal POS Modern. Explain the complete purchase order lifecycle from creation through approval and fulfillment tracking. Document purchase order creation with product selection, quantity management, pricing details, and supplier linking. Cover purchase order status tracking including draft, approved, received, and completed states. Explain purchase order modification capabilities and approval workflows. Document purchase order history and audit trails for compliance purposes. Include purchase order reporting features and analytics. Provide practical examples of common purchase order scenarios, supplier coordination processes, and integration with inventory management. Address purchase order validation rules, error handling, and performance optimization techniques.

wiki_catalogs.name: Customer Ledger Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the customer ledger system in Royal POS Modern. Explain the ledger functionality for tracking customer transactions, purchases, payments, and outstanding balances. Document the ledger display components showing transaction history, payment records, and account status. Cover the integration with customer stock management for tracking purchased items and inventory movements. Detail the ledger calculation algorithms for maintaining accurate account balances and transaction sequencing. Explain the ledger data structure including transaction types, amounts, dates, and references to related sales or payment records. Include practical examples of ledger operations, balance calculations, and transaction reconciliation. Address ledger performance considerations for large customer datasets and real-time balance updates. Provide guidance on ledger maintenance, data consistency, and troubleshooting ledger discrepancies.

wiki_catalogs.name: Barcode Scanning Integration
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed barcode scanning integration documentation for Royal POS Modern. Explain the QuaggaJS implementation for barcode reading, scanner configuration, and camera access permissions. Document the barcode data processing pipeline, product matching algorithms, and inventory synchronization mechanisms. Cover the scanner component architecture, event handling, and real-time barcode detection. Explain barcode format support, scanning accuracy optimization, and error handling strategies. Include detailed explanations of barcode data parsing, product lookup procedures, and inventory update workflows. Address mobile device camera integration, scanning performance optimization, and troubleshooting guidance for common scanning issues. Provide practical examples of barcode scanning workflows and diagnostic procedures for scanner problems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Expense Management and Cost Control
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the expense management and cost control system. Explain the complete expense tracking workflow from expense entry through categorization and reporting. Document expense recording processes, vendor management, and payment tracking. Cover expense categories, approval workflows, and budget monitoring capabilities. Detail the expense reporting features including expense summaries, variance analysis, and cost allocation. Include practical examples of expense entry scenarios, category classification, and reimbursement processing. Address expense policy enforcement, receipt management, and audit trail functionality. Provide guidance on expense optimization strategies, cost center allocation, and integration with accounting systems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Reports and Analytics
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed reports and analytics documentation for Royal POS Modern reporting system. Explain the custom report generation capabilities, data export functionality across multiple formats (PDF, Excel, CSV), and performance analytics features. Document the sales analytics dashboard with revenue tracking, trend analysis, and performance metrics. Cover spending analytics for expense tracking and cost analysis. Include practical examples of generating custom reports, exporting data for external analysis, and interpreting analytical insights. Explain the reporting engine architecture, data aggregation methods, and filtering capabilities. Address report scheduling, automated reporting workflows, and integration with external business intelligence tools.

wiki_catalogs.name: Supabase Service API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for the Supabase Service integration. Document authentication methods including login, logout, signup, password reset, and session management. Cover real-time subscription APIs for live data updates, database operation wrappers, and Supabase client configuration. Include authentication state management, JWT token handling, and user session persistence. Document database connection pooling, query optimization, and error handling strategies. Provide examples of authenticated requests, real-time data synchronization, and offline-first data handling patterns. Address security considerations, rate limiting, and performance monitoring for Supabase operations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Data Export Capabilities
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the data export system in Royal POS Modern. Explain the export functionality across multiple formats including CSV, Excel, and PDF. Document the ExportUtils and ExcelUtils implementations, data transformation processes, and export formatting options. Cover the export workflow from report selection to file generation, including error handling and validation. Include practical examples of exporting different report types, handling large datasets, and optimizing export performance. Explain the export data structure, field mapping, and formatting rules. Address export limitations, file size considerations, and browser compatibility. Document the integration with external systems and data import/export workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Product and Inventory API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for Product and Inventory management operations. Document product CRUD operations including getProducts for catalog retrieval, getProductById for individual product lookup, getProductByBarcode and getProductBySKU for alternative identification methods, createProduct with comprehensive validation for required fields (name, prices, quantities), updateProduct with validation rules, and deleteProduct with cascade handling. Cover inventory operations including incrementProductStock and decrementProductStock with automatic stock calculations and safety checks. Document parameter schemas for Product interface including pricing strategies, stock management fields, and validation constraints. Include return value formats, error handling for stock overflow/underflow conditions, and database constraint violations. Provide practical examples of inventory workflows, barcode scanning integration, and stock adjustment scenarios.

wiki_catalogs.name: Receipt Settings
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Receipt Settings section covering sales receipt configuration. Document the receipt printing preferences, header customization, and logo display options. Explain the custom receipt template system including template enable/disable functionality, header/footer text editing, and conditional display options for business info, transaction details, item details, totals, and payment information. Include comprehensive coverage of template customization parameters such as font size options (10px-16px), paper width settings (280px-400px), and layout controls. Provide practical examples of creating professional receipt templates, preview functionality for testing layouts, and integration with the printing system. Document the template persistence mechanism and troubleshooting common template configuration issues.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication and User Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive authentication and user management documentation for Royal POS Modern. Explain the Supabase authentication integration including user registration, login/logout processes, and session management. Document the role-based access control (RBAC) system with detailed descriptions of admin, manager, salesman, and staff roles and their respective permissions. Cover the restricted sales access system that enforces database-level security through Row Level Security (RLS) policies. Explain the authentication context provider pattern used throughout the application and how protected routes are implemented. Document password reset functionality, user profile management, and access logs. Include security best practices, session timeout handling, and multi-device session management. Provide practical examples of implementing authentication guards and role-based UI components. Address common authentication issues and debugging techniques.

wiki_catalogs.name: Security Features and Best Practices
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for security features and best practices in Royal POS Modern. Explain the Row Level Security (RLS) implementation that provides database-level access control for multi-outlet environments. Document the session management security measures including automatic logout, session timeout handling, and secure token storage. Cover the authentication error handling system and how security violations are logged and reported. Explain the Supabase security setup including database policies, function security, and API access controls. Document password security requirements, encryption practices, and data protection measures. Include practical examples of implementing security middleware, validating user permissions, and handling security events. Address common security vulnerabilities in POS systems, mitigation strategies, and security monitoring approaches. Cover backup and recovery procedures, audit logging, and compliance considerations for retail environments.

wiki_catalogs.name: Goods Receipt Note (GRN)
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the Goods Receipt Note (GRN) system covering supplier delivery management and inventory receiving processes. Explain the GRN creation workflow including supplier selection, product addition, quantity entry, and delivery details capture. Document the GRN dashboard showing pending, received, and completed deliveries with status tracking. Cover the integration with supplier management and purchase order systems. Explain the inventory update process triggered by successful GRN completion and how stock quantities are adjusted. Document the GRN details interface showing delivery items, quantities, costs, and supplier information. Include practical examples of creating GRNs for different supplier scenarios, handling partial deliveries, and managing delivery discrepancies. Address GRN approval workflows, multi-outlet delivery coordination, and integration with accounting systems. Provide troubleshooting guidance for GRN-related issues, delivery tracking problems, and inventory synchronization errors.

wiki_catalogs.name: Sales Analytics and Reporting
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive sales analytics documentation explaining the reporting and analytics capabilities of Royal POS Modern. Document the sales dashboard with key performance indicators including daily sales volume, revenue trends, popular products, and customer acquisition metrics. Explain the sales management report with detailed breakdowns by product category, salesperson performance, time-based analysis, and comparative reporting. Cover the analytics filters for date ranges, product categories, customer segments, and outlet comparisons. Detail the export functionality for generating reports in various formats including CSV, Excel, and PDF. Explain the real-time data synchronization ensuring accurate reporting across all business locations. Document the customizable report templates and automated report scheduling. Include guidance on interpreting sales trends, identifying peak sales periods, and making data-driven business decisions. Address performance considerations for large datasets and report optimization techniques.

wiki_catalogs.name: Purchase Transactions and History
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for purchase transaction management and history tracking in Royal POS Modern. Explain the complete purchase transaction lifecycle including transaction recording, payment processing, and reconciliation workflows. Document purchase transaction types, payment methods, and transaction categorization. Cover transaction search and filtering capabilities with date ranges, supplier filters, and amount thresholds. Explain transaction reporting features including purchase analytics, supplier performance metrics, and spending patterns. Document transaction reversal and correction procedures. Include practical examples of transaction processing scenarios, reconciliation workflows, and audit trail maintenance. Address transaction data integrity, security considerations, and performance optimization for large transaction datasets.

wiki_catalogs.name: Debt Management and Collections
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed content for the debt management system in Royal POS Modern. Explain the debt tracking functionality for managing customer credit sales, outstanding invoices, and payment schedules. Document the debt collection workflows including debt monitoring, aging reports, and collection reminders. Cover the integration with settlement processing for partial and full debt payments. Detail the debt recovery procedures and bad debt management processes. Explain the debt categorization system for different types of outstanding balances and payment terms. Include practical examples of debt entry, payment application, and debt resolution scenarios. Address debt reporting capabilities including aging analysis, collection effectiveness metrics, and receivables turnover calculations. Provide guidance on debt management best practices, collection strategies, and maintaining healthy customer credit relationships. Document the relationship between debt management and overall customer financial health tracking.

wiki_catalogs.name: Capital and Asset Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the capital and asset management system. Explain the complete capital tracking workflow from asset acquisition through depreciation and disposal. Document asset registration processes, valuation methods, and lifecycle management. Cover monetary assets tracking, cash flow management, and investment monitoring. Detail the capital structure reporting including balance sheet components and equity analysis. Include practical examples of asset entry scenarios, depreciation calculations, and capital allocation strategies. Address asset utilization tracking, maintenance scheduling, and impairment testing. Provide guidance on capital efficiency metrics, return on investment analysis, and long-term financial planning integration.

wiki_catalogs.name: Access Logs and Monitoring
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive access logs and monitoring documentation for Royal POS Modern system audit trail and activity monitoring. Document the access log system for tracking user activities, system usage patterns, and security events. Explain the audit trail functionality for compliance purposes and internal monitoring. Cover system health monitoring capabilities, performance metrics tracking, and alert mechanisms. Include practical examples of reviewing access logs, setting up monitoring alerts, and analyzing system performance data. Document the integration with Supabase for real-time monitoring and logging. Address log retention policies, security considerations, and troubleshooting procedures using access logs.

wiki_catalogs.name: Authentication Service API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for the Authentication Service. Document user authentication methods including login, logout, register, forgot password, and reset password functionality. Cover session management APIs, user profile operations, and role-based access control checks. Include authentication state management, JWT token handling, and user permission validation. Document protected route guards, authentication middleware, and session persistence mechanisms. Provide examples of authentication flows, error handling for authentication failures, and security best practices. Address user registration workflows, email verification processes, and account management operations.

wiki_catalogs.name: Sales Analytics Dashboard
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the sales analytics dashboard system. Explain the sales performance metrics, revenue tracking, and trend analysis capabilities. Document the dashboard components including revenue charts, sales trends, top-selling products, and customer analytics. Cover the data aggregation methods, time-series analysis, and comparative reporting features. Include practical examples of interpreting sales data, identifying performance patterns, and making data-driven business decisions. Explain the integration with sales transactions, inventory data, and customer information. Address real-time data updates, historical data analysis, and forecasting capabilities. Document the dashboard customization options, filter mechanisms, and export functionality for external analysis.

wiki_catalogs.name: Purchase Receipt Settings
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Purchase Receipt Settings section focusing on supplier purchase receipt configuration. Document the purchase receipt printing preferences, custom template system, and supplier-specific information display. Explain the purchase receipt template customization including header/footer editing, font size and paper width configuration, and conditional display options for business info, transaction details, item details, totals, payment information, and supplier details. Include practical examples of configuring purchase receipt templates, preview functionality for testing layouts, and the relationship between purchase templates and the printing system. Document template-specific settings, validation rules, and troubleshooting guidance for purchase receipt template issues. Explain how purchase receipts differ from sales receipts in terms of information display and layout requirements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Sales and Purchase API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for Sales and Purchase operations. Document sales management including Sale interface with customer relationships, payment processing, and status tracking. Cover purchase order operations with PurchaseOrder and PurchaseOrderItem interfaces including order lifecycle management, supplier relationships, and inventory updates. Document invoice generation, receipt creation, and sales reporting functionality. Include detailed parameter schemas for complex transaction objects, return value formats for sales summaries, and error handling for payment failures and inventory conflicts. Provide practical examples of complete sales workflows from order placement to payment processing, purchase order fulfillment, and inventory reconciliation. Document integration with payment systems, tax calculation, and receipt generation APIs.

wiki_catalogs.name: Multi-Location Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive multi-location management documentation for Royal POS Modern. Explain the outlet architecture and how the system supports multiple business locations with centralized management. Document outlet creation, configuration, and management processes including outlet-specific data isolation and access control. Cover the outlet switching mechanism and how users navigate between different business locations. Explain the outlet-specific data models and how they integrate with the central system. Document outlet reports and analytics that provide location-specific insights. Include practical examples of setting up new outlets, configuring outlet managers, and managing outlet-specific settings. Address data synchronization between outlets and performance considerations for multi-location deployments. Provide troubleshooting guidance for outlet access issues and data consistency problems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Inventory Audit and Adjustments
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for inventory audit and adjustment capabilities covering physical inventory counting, damage tracking, and inventory corrections. Explain the inventory audit process including cycle counting, full inventory takes, and discrepancy identification. Document the damaged products management system covering damage reporting, categorization, and disposal workflows. Cover the return items processing including customer returns, supplier returns, and internal transfers. Explain the inventory adjustment system allowing manual quantity corrections, cost adjustments, and inventory reclassifications. Document the audit trail for all inventory changes including who made the change, when it was made, and why. Include practical examples of conducting inventory audits, handling shrinkage, processing damaged goods, and managing returns. Address inventory valuation adjustments, write-offs, and integration with financial reporting. Provide guidance on establishing audit schedules, handling inventory discrepancies, and maintaining accurate inventory records for tax and accounting purposes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Sales Permissions and Access Control
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed sales permissions and access control documentation explaining the role-based security system for sales operations. Document the permission matrix defining what actions each user role can perform including admin, manager, cashier, and staff members. Explain the sales-specific restrictions preventing unauthorized access to sales processing, price modifications, and discount approvals. Cover the module-level access control ensuring users only see relevant sales modules based on their roles. Detail the transaction-level permissions controlling who can process sales, modify existing transactions, and approve special discounts. Explain the audit trail functionality logging all sales-related activities with timestamps and user identification. Document the permission escalation procedures and approval workflows for higher-value transactions. Include guidance on configuring user permissions during onboarding, troubleshooting access issues, and maintaining security compliance. Address the integration with Supabase RLS policies and database-level security measures.

wiki_catalogs.name: Supplier Settlements and Payments
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive supplier settlement system documentation for Royal POS Modern. Explain the complete supplier payment processing workflow from settlement calculation through payment execution. Document supplier settlement types, payment terms, and settlement scheduling. Cover supplier payment methods including cash, bank transfer, and mobile money integration. Explain settlement reconciliation processes and outstanding balance tracking. Document supplier payment history, payment reminders, and overdue payment management. Cover supplier credit limits, payment terms negotiation, and relationship management features. Include practical examples of settlement scenarios, payment processing workflows, and supplier communication features. Address settlement reporting, financial analytics, and compliance requirements for supplier payment management.

wiki_catalogs.name: Customer Settlement Processing
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for customer settlement processing in Royal POS Modern. Explain the settlement workflow for processing customer payments, applying payments to outstanding debts, and generating settlement confirmations. Document the settlement types including partial payments, full settlements, and payment plan arrangements. Cover the integration with payment processing systems for various payment methods (cash, card, mobile money). Detail the settlement calculation algorithms for determining payment application order and outstanding balance reduction. Explain the settlement documentation including receipts, payment confirmations, and settlement summaries. Include practical examples of settlement operations, payment allocation rules, and settlement validation processes. Address settlement security measures, audit trails, and reconciliation procedures. Provide guidance on settlement troubleshooting, refund processing, and settlement dispute resolution. Document the relationship between settlements and financial reporting, including impact on revenue recognition and accounts receivable tracking.

wiki_catalogs.name: Financial Reporting and Analytics
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the financial reporting and analytics system. Explain the complete reporting workflow from data extraction through report generation and distribution. Document report types including profit and loss statements, balance sheets, cash flow statements, and custom reports. Cover analytics dashboards, KPI tracking, and trend analysis capabilities. Detail the export functionality supporting multiple formats including PDF, Excel, and CSV. Include practical examples of report creation scenarios, data filtering, and automated reporting schedules. Address report customization options, sharing permissions, and regulatory compliance reporting. Provide guidance on financial benchmarking, performance monitoring, and executive dashboard configuration.

wiki_catalogs.name: Employee Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed employee management documentation for Royal POS Modern user administration and access control. Document the employee profile management system including user registration, role assignment, and permission configuration. Explain the role-based access control (RBAC) system with different user types (admin, manager, cashier, staff) and their respective permissions. Cover user authentication workflows, session management, and security features. Include practical examples of adding new employees, configuring access permissions, and managing user accounts. Document the integration with authentication context, permission utilities, and access control mechanisms. Address user onboarding procedures, password management, and account deactivation processes.

wiki_catalogs.name: Utility Service API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for the Utility Service functions. Document print utilities for receipt generation, PDF creation, and print queue management. Cover export utilities for data export in various formats (CSV, Excel, PDF), file upload handling, and data transformation functions. Detail template utilities for dynamic content generation, template rendering, and custom template management. Include excel utilities for spreadsheet operations, data formatting, and batch processing. Document file upload utilities, cloud storage integration, and document management functions. Provide examples of print job creation, export operations, template customization, and file processing workflows. Address performance considerations, error handling, and integration patterns for utility functions.

wiki_catalogs.name: Spending Analytics
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the spending analytics system in Royal POS Modern. Explain the expense tracking, cost analysis, and expenditure categorization features. Document the spending analytics interface, expense classification, and cost trend analysis. Cover the expense data sources, categorization algorithms, and reporting mechanisms. Include practical examples of analyzing spending patterns, identifying cost optimization opportunities, and monitoring budget performance. Explain the integration with expense records, supplier payments, and financial transactions. Address expense forecasting, variance analysis, and cost allocation methods. Document the spending analytics reports, export capabilities, and integration with accounting systems.

wiki_catalogs.name: Notification Settings
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed documentation for the Notification Settings section covering system notification preferences. Document email notification configuration, low stock alert settings, and daily report preferences. Explain how notification settings integrate with the system's alert mechanisms and reporting features. Include practical examples of configuring notification preferences, understanding notification triggers, and managing notification frequency. Document the relationship between notification settings and system performance, troubleshooting notification delivery issues, and best practices for notification management. Explain how notifications are triggered by system events and how administrators can monitor notification effectiveness.

wiki_catalogs.name: Customer and Supplier API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create detailed API documentation for Customer and Supplier management operations. Document Customer interface with CRM features including contact information, credit limits, loyalty points, and transaction history. Cover Supplier interface with supplier profiles, product catalogs, and payment terms. Include customer settlement operations with CustomerSettlement interface for payment processing, debt management, and ledger tracking. Document supplier settlement operations with SupplierSettlement interface for supplier payments and account reconciliation. Provide parameter schemas for customer profiles, supplier relationships, and settlement transactions. Include return value formats for customer reports, supplier balances, and settlement summaries. Document error handling for credit limit violations, payment processing failures, and account reconciliation issues. Provide practical examples of customer onboarding, supplier relationship management, and automated settlement workflows.

wiki_catalogs.name: Sales Management System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive sales management system documentation for Royal POS Modern. Explain the complete sales workflow from product selection through payment processing and receipt generation. Document the sales terminal interface with real-time product scanning, discount application, and multiple payment method support. Cover sales order management including order creation, modification, cancellation, and historical tracking. Explain the sales analytics dashboard with revenue tracking, sales trends, and performance metrics. Document the restricted sales access system that ensures only authorized personnel can process sales transactions. Include detailed explanations of the sales cart functionality, customer association, and sales history management. Address sales reporting capabilities, tax calculations, and integration with inventory systems. Provide practical examples of common sales scenarios and troubleshooting guidance for sales-related issues.

wiki_catalogs.name: Tax Management and Compliance
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the tax management and compliance system. Explain the complete tax processing workflow from tax calculation through filing and compliance tracking. Document VAT handling, tax rate management, and tax reporting requirements. Cover tax categorization, deduction tracking, and tax optimization strategies. Detail the tax compliance features including tax summaries, audit trails, and regulatory reporting. Include practical examples of tax calculation scenarios, rate changes, and compliance monitoring. Address tax law updates, regulatory changes, and automated tax processing. Provide guidance on tax planning, deduction maximization, and integration with tax preparation software.

wiki_catalogs.name: Security Settings
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive documentation for the Security Settings section covering system security preferences. Document password requirement enforcement, session timeout configuration, and two-factor authentication setup. Explain how security settings protect system access and user sessions. Include practical examples of configuring security preferences, understanding session timeout impacts, and implementing two-factor authentication. Document the relationship between security settings and user experience, troubleshooting authentication issues, and best practices for maintaining system security. Explain how security settings integrate with the authentication system and role-based access control. Provide guidance on balancing security requirements with user convenience and system accessibility.

wiki_catalogs.name: Financial Operations API
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive API documentation for Financial Operations including Expense management, Debt tracking, Discount management, and Tax operations. Document Expense interface with categorization, receipt management, and business expense tracking. Cover Debt interface for customer and supplier debt management including payment tracking and aging reports. Document Discount interface with discount categories, product associations, and usage tracking. Include TaxRecord interface for tax compliance including tax calculations, filing status, and payment tracking. Provide parameter schemas for financial transactions, return value formats for financial reports, and error handling for tax compliance issues. Include practical examples of expense reimbursement workflows, debt collection processes, discount application scenarios, and tax preparation procedures. Document integration with accounting systems and financial reporting requirements.

wiki_catalogs.name: Inventory Management System
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Create comprehensive inventory management system documentation for Royal POS Modern. Explain the complete inventory workflow from product catalog management through stock tracking, receiving goods, and inventory adjustments. Document the product management interface including product CRUD operations, category management, and pricing strategies. Cover the inventory tracking system with real-time stock levels, low stock alerts, and batch management. Explain the Goods Receipt Note (GRN) process for supplier deliveries and inventory updates. Document inventory audit capabilities for tracking discrepancies and managing inventory adjustments. Include detailed explanations of stock synchronization between sales and inventory systems. Address barcode integration, bulk product imports, and inventory reporting. Provide practical examples of common inventory scenarios including stock receiving, transfers, and adjustments. Include troubleshooting guidance for inventory-related issues and performance optimization tips.

wiki_catalogs.name: Payables and Receivables Management
wiki_catalogs.prompt: Develop detailed documentation for the payables and receivables management system. Explain the complete accounts receivable workflow from invoice generation through collection and bad debt management. Document accounts payable processes including vendor invoicing, payment scheduling, and supplier relationship management. Cover aging analysis, credit management, and cash flow forecasting. Detail the receivables and payables reporting including outstanding balances, due dates, and collection metrics. Include practical examples of receivable entry scenarios, payment applications, and write-off procedures. Address credit limit management, dispute resolution, and integration with bank systems. Provide guidance on collections strategies, supplier negotiation, and working capital optimization.

Explain how display settings integrate with the localization system and responsive design principles. Provide guidance on accessibility considerations and user interface optimization techniques.

wiki_overview.content:
<blog>

# Royal POS Modern - Comprehensive Project Analysis

## 1. Project Introduction

### Purpose Statement
Royal POS Modern is a comprehensive Point of Sale (POS) system designed for modern retail businesses, particularly targeting multi-location retail chains in Tanzania. The system provides integrated solutions for inventory management, sales processing, customer relationship management, supplier coordination, and financial reporting.

### Core Goals and Objectives
- **Multi-Location Management**: Support for multiple business outlets with centralized data management
- **Real-Time Operations**: Live inventory tracking, sales processing, and financial monitoring
- **Role-Based Access Control**: Granular permissions for different user roles (Admin, Manager, Cashier, Staff)
- **Mobile-First Design**: Responsive interface optimized for both desktop and mobile devices
- **Cloud-Native Architecture**: Built on modern web technologies with cloud database integration

### Target Audience
- Small to medium retail businesses in Tanzania
- Multi-store retail chains requiring centralized management
- Businesses seeking modern POS solutions with advanced reporting capabilities
- Organizations requiring comprehensive inventory and financial management

## 2. Technical Architecture

### Component Breakdown
The application follows a modern React architecture with the following key layers:

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[React Frontend] --> B[UI Components]
    A --> C[Context Providers]
    A --> D[Services Layer]
    
    B --> E[ShadCN UI Library]
    B --> F[Custom Components]
    
    C --> G[Auth Context]
    C --> H[Language Context]
    
    D --> I[Database Service]
    D --> J[Authentication Service]
    D --> K[Utility Services]
    
    I --> L[Supabase Database]
    L --> M[PostgreSQL Schema]
    L --> N[Row Level Security]
    
    style A fill:#e1f5fe
    style L fill:#f3e5f5
```

### Design Patterns
- **Context Pattern**: Centralized state management for authentication and language
- **Repository Pattern**: Database service abstraction layer
- **Provider Pattern**: Component composition for UI elements
- **Factory Pattern**: Dynamic component rendering based on user roles
- **Observer Pattern**: Real-time authentication state monitoring

### System Relationships
The system integrates multiple services through well-defined interfaces:

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User Interface
    participant A as Auth Context
    participant S as Supabase Client
    participant DB as PostgreSQL Database
    
    U->>A: Login Request
    A->>S: signInWithPassword()
    S->>DB: Authentication Query
    DB-->>S: User Data
    S-->>A: Session Data
    A-->>U: Authenticated State
```

### Data Flow Diagrams
```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[User Input] --> B[Form Validation]
    B --> C[Service Layer]
    C --> D[Database Operations]
    D --> E[Data Persistence]
    E --> F[State Updates]
    F --> G[UI Rendering]
    
    style A fill:#e8f5e8
    style G fill:#fff3e0
```

## 3. Key Implementation

### Main Entry Points
- **Application Bootstrap**: `src/main.tsx` - Initializes React app with mobile optimizations and service worker registration
- **Root Component**: `src/App.tsx` - Configures routing, providers, and global error handling
- **Build Configuration**: `vite.config.ts` - Optimized build settings with chunk splitting for performance

### Core Modules
- **Authentication System**: `src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx` - Manages user sessions and state
- **Database Abstraction**: `src/services/databaseService.ts` - Comprehensive CRUD operations for all business entities
- **Permission Management**: `src/utils/salesPermissionUtils.ts` - Role-based access control system
- **Layout System**: `src/components/AdvancedLayout.tsx` - Responsive navigation with sidebar and mobile menu

### Configuration Approach
- **Environment Variables**: Supabase credentials and application settings
- **Tailwind CSS**: Utility-first styling with custom theme configuration
- **TypeScript**: Strict typing across all components and services
- **Vite Build System**: Modern bundling with development server and hot module replacement

### External Dependencies
Key dependencies include:
- **React Ecosystem**: React 18.3.1, React Router DOM, React Hook Form
- **UI Framework**: ShadCN UI components with Radix UI primitives
- **Database**: Supabase JavaScript client for PostgreSQL integration
- **State Management**: React Query for server state synchronization
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom animations and responsive utilities
- **Charts & Analytics**: Recharts for data visualization
- **Barcode Processing**: QuaggaJS for barcode scanning functionality

### Integration Points
- **Supabase Authentication**: OAuth, magic links, and session management
- **PostgreSQL Database**: Structured data storage with Row Level Security
- **Cloud Storage**: File upload capabilities for receipts and documents
- **QR Code Generation**: Integrated QR code functionality for receipts and inventory
- **Print Services**: HTML-to-PDF conversion for receipts and reports

### Component Relationship Diagrams
```mermaid
graph LR
    A[AdvancedLayout] --> B[Navigation Components]
    A --> C[Content Area]
    
    B --> D[Dashboard Navigation]
    B --> E[Module Links]
    
    C --> F[Page Components]
    F --> G[Business Logic]
    G --> H[Database Operations]
    
    style A fill:#e3f2fd
    style F fill:#f1f8e9
```

## 4. Key Features

### Functionality Overview
The system provides comprehensive business management capabilities:

#### Core Business Modules
- **Sales Management**: Real-time sales processing with multiple payment methods
- **Inventory Control**: Stock tracking, low-stock alerts, and batch management
- **Customer Management**: CRM features with loyalty programs and transaction history
- **Supplier Coordination**: Purchase orders, supplier payments, and delivery tracking
- **Financial Reporting**: Comprehensive analytics and financial statements
- **Multi-Location Support**: Centralized management across multiple business outlets

#### Advanced Features
- **Role-Based Access Control**: Fine-grained permissions for different user roles
- **Barcode Scanning**: Integrated barcode reader for quick product identification
- **QR Code Integration**: Receipt generation and inventory tracking via QR codes
- **Mobile Optimization**: Touch-friendly interface for tablet and mobile devices
- **Offline Capability**: Service worker support for basic offline functionality

### Implementation Highlights
- **Modular Architecture**: `src/components/` - Reusable UI components with consistent design
- **Business Logic Layer**: `src/services/` - Separation of concerns between UI and data operations
- **Utility Functions**: `src/utils/` - Shared functionality across different business domains
- **Migration System**: `migrations/` - Version-controlled database schema evolution
- **Testing Infrastructure**: `src/test/` - Unit testing and integration testing setup

### Feature Architecture Diagrams
```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Unauthenticated
    Unauthenticated --> Authenticated: Login Success
    Authenticated --> Dashboard: Navigate
    Dashboard --> Sales: Sales Module
    Dashboard --> Inventory: Inventory Module
    Dashboard --> Customers: Customer Module
    Dashboard --> Reports: Reports Module
    Sales --> Dashboard: Back
    Inventory --> Dashboard: Back
    Customers --> Dashboard: Back
    Reports --> Dashboard: Back
    Authenticated --> Unauthenticated: Logout
```

## 5. Conclusion and Recommendations

### Project Architecture Summary
Royal POS Modern demonstrates a well-structured, scalable architecture that effectively combines modern frontend technologies with robust backend services. The system successfully addresses the complex requirements of multi-location retail management through:

- **Clean Separation of Concerns**: Clear division between UI, business logic, and data layers
- **Modern Development Practices**: TypeScript, React Hooks, and functional programming patterns
- **Performance Optimization**: Strategic code splitting and efficient state management
- **Security Implementation**: Role-based access control and secure authentication

### Architectural Strengths
1. **Scalable Component Architecture**: Modular design allows for easy feature expansion
2. **Robust Data Management**: Comprehensive database service with proper error handling
3. **User Experience Focus**: Responsive design with mobile-first approach
4. **Security Implementation**: Proper authentication and authorization mechanisms
5. **Development Efficiency**: Well-organized codebase with clear documentation

### Potential Improvement Areas
1. **State Management**: Consider implementing a more sophisticated state management solution for complex business workflows
2. **Testing Coverage**: Expand unit and integration testing coverage for critical business logic
3. **Performance Monitoring**: Implement performance metrics and monitoring for production environments
4. **Documentation**: Enhance inline documentation for complex business logic components
5. **Error Handling**: Standardize error handling patterns across all service layers

### Actionable Recommendations
1. **Implement Redux Toolkit**: For complex state management scenarios and improved debugging
2. **Add Comprehensive Testing**: Jest and React Testing Library for unit and integration tests
3. **Performance Optimization**: Lazy loading for heavy components and image optimization
4. **API Documentation**: OpenAPI specification for database service endpoints
5. **Monitoring Setup**: Sentry for error tracking and performance monitoring

### Next Steps for Project Evolution
1. **Microservices Migration**: Consider breaking down monolithic components into microservices
2. **Real-time Features**: Implement WebSocket connections for live updates and notifications
3. **Mobile App Development**: React Native implementation for native mobile experience
4. **AI Integration**: Machine learning for demand forecasting and inventory optimization
5. **Third-party Integrations**: API integrations with accounting software and payment processors

The Royal POS Modern project represents a solid foundation for a comprehensive retail management solution, with clear pathways for future enhancement and scalability.

---

**Sources:**
- [package.json](package.json)
- [src/main.tsx](src/main.tsx)
- [src/App.tsx](src/App.tsx)
- [src/lib/supabaseClient.ts](src/lib/supabaseClient.ts)
- [src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx](src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx)
- [src/services/databaseService.ts](src/services/databaseService.ts)
- [src/pages/Dashboard.tsx](src/pages/Dashboard.tsx)
- [src/components/AdvancedLayout.tsx](src/components/AdvancedLayout.tsx)
- [src/utils/salesPermissionUtils.ts](src/utils/salesPermissionUtils.ts)
- [src/components/ui/button.tsx](src/components/ui/button.tsx)
- [vite.config.ts](vite.config.ts)
- [tailwind.config.ts](tailwind.config.ts)
- [migrations/20260220_create_outlets_table.sql](migrations/20260220_create_outlets_table.sql)

</blog>
